body_txt: This is the villainous counterpart to Heroic Mime ; while the hero's silence makes them open to interpretation , the Silent Antagonist's silence makes them a sort of Enigmatic Minion , or in the worst of cases, an Unknown Rival or an utterly implacable force of nature . There is just something deeply uncomfortable about a character who commits various abominable acts without so much as a peep from the perpretator , their indifference making them seem utterly inhuman. A Sub-Trope of He Who Must Not Be Heard . The Super-Trope of Enemy Mime (though not all villainous mimes have to be fully silent). Sister Trope to Enigmatic Minion . See also Soft-Spoken Sadist , who does speak, but is very calm and relaxed.
